rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §33.027 governs challenges to school library materials. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative interaction.
quote: Sec. 33.027. CHALLENGE OR APPEAL REGARDING LIBRARY MATERIALS; LOCAL SCHOOL LIBRARY ADVISORY COUNCIL RECOMMENDATIONS.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text pertains to school library material challenges and is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
